title: doxantha unguis-cati
intro: Doxantha unguis-cati, also known as cat's claw, is a type of flowering vine native to the Amazon rainforest. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been linked to various health benefits, including reducing joint pain and inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting digestive health. Cat's claw can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, allowing users to incorporate its benefits into their daily routine through herbal preparations.
